transcript:
Agent: DriveAssist roadside help, this is Lisa. What's your emergency?
Customer: Hi Lisa. I'm stranded on Highway 101 near mile marker 47. My tire blew out and I don't have a spare.
Agent: I'm glad you called. Are you safe? Are you off the roadway?
Customer: Yes, I managed to pull onto the shoulder. Hazard lights are on.
Agent: Good. Stay in the car if it's safe to do so. I'm pulling up your membership. Can I get your name or membership number?
Customer: Tom Reeves, membership number DA-552019.
Agent: Got it, Tom. I can see your account. You're covered for tire service. I'm locating the nearest service provider to mile marker 47 on Highway 101. What's the nearest cross street or exit?
Customer: I passed Exit 23 — I think that's Route 9.
Agent: Perfect. I have a mobile tire service truck about 8 miles away. Estimated arrival is 35-40 minutes. I'm dispatching them right now.
Customer: Do I need to stay on the line?
Agent: You don't have to, but I'd recommend staying with me until dispatch confirms they've received the job. Can I also get your cell number to give to the technician?
Customer: It's 555-203-4411.
Agent: Got it. Dispatch confirmed — truck is en route. Technician's name is Gary, he'll call you 10 minutes before arrival. Your service request number is DA-2024-0891.
Customer: What if they can't fix it on the spot? It's a pretty bad blowout.
Agent: If a roadside repair isn't possible, we'll arrange a flatbed tow to the nearest tire shop at no additional cost under your membership. We'll also arrange a courtesy ride if needed.
Customer: That's good to know. I was worried about being stuck here for hours.
Agent: You're in good hands. Is there anything else I can help with while you wait?
Customer: No, I'm fine. Thanks for being so calm and helpful, Lisa.
Agent: Stay safe, Tom. Gary will be there shortly!
